DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS ERNEST TARK III AND FLORISCITO CALUMPANG'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 4, 5, 6 AND 8 TO PLEAD THAT PLAINTIFF ASSUMED THE OBLIGATIONS OF THE MASTER LEASE, WHICH IS A REQUIREMENT TO PUT PLAINTIFF IN PRIVITY WITH DEFENDANT AS A THIRD-PARTY BENEFICIARY. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2 TO PLEAD A QUALIFYING EXERCISE OF A PROTECTED RIGHT, IF PLAINITFF CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH. MERELY CONTINUING TO OCCUPY UNDER THE SUB-LEASE IS INSUFFICIENT. OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3, WHICH DOES NOT DEPEND ON PRIVITY. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJB/SN-X) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
